summary: Shifted 20% of spend from broad prospecting to retargeting for Mon–Wed utilization because prospecting CPL increased 35% over the last 7 days while retargeting maintained stable reservation-to-show rate.

assumptions: Tracking events are firing correctly for WhatsApp clicks and reservation confirmations.
Peak hour capacity constraints remain unchanged.

failureModes: Retargeting audience too small leads to frequency spike and creative fatigue.
Prospecting drop reduces pipeline for next 14 days.
risk.rollbackPlan: Revert to previous spend split within 24h if reservations drop >10% WoW or frequency exceeds 8 with CTR decline >20%.

notes: Next test: new proof-led creative batch to reduce CPL on prospecting.

summary: Clinic compliance gate: removed all outcome-guarantee language and replaced with process/credentials proof framework before approving the ad copy pack for launch.

assumptions: Meta policy enforcement is strict for medical claims; conservative copy reduces disapproval risk.

failureModes: Ad disapproval or account restriction if sensitive claims remain.
Brand trust damage if promise exceeds reality.
risk.rollbackPlan: If disapprovals persist, pause ads and route through ComplianceMonitor for a second pass; switch to educational content objective for 7–14 days.

notes: Future: build a clinic-safe claims dictionary as a reusable asset.
